purpose: Machine-readable stable block manifest used by scripts/check-stable-blocks.js.

extensionPaths: add new confirmed invariants to the matrix before promoting modules
update affected module responsibility entries in the same task

observationNotes: Captures confirmed long-term product and architecture invariants rather than volatile tuning values.
Referenced by the responsibility index and production roadmap as the required stable promotion authority.
promotionEvidence.publicContract: Defines the stable promotion criteria and invariant vocabulary used before any candidate module can become stable.
promotionEvidence.extensionPath: Add new confirmed invariants here first, then update the affected responsibility-index entries and stable manifest blocks in the same change.
promotionEvidence.reopenExceptions: May be reopened only for bug, performance, security, contract-hardening, or governance-update reasons.

stableSurface: extension path metadata for guarded blocks
stable manifest validation and stable reopen enforcement
extensionPaths: add newly promoted stable files to stableBlocks
keep candidate modules out of this manifest until promotion is complete

observationNotes: Guards stable files against casual feature-work edits through the shared architecture gate.
Now requires manifest promotion evidence and responsibility-index public contract, extension path, and regression coverage for every stable block.
promotionEvidence.publicContract: Defines the machine-readable stable block list, promotion evidence shape, candidate queue, and stable reopen policy consumed by scripts/check-stable-blocks.js.
promotionEvidence.extensionPath: Promote a candidate by adding its files plus promotion evidence here, updating its responsibility-index status and regression commands, and keeping focused tests in the architecture baseline.
promotionEvidence.reopenExceptions: May be reopened only for bug, performance, security, contract-hardening, or governance-update reasons.

reopenPolicy.note: Architecture checks fail when a tracked stable file is changed unless ALLOW_STABLE_BLOCK_REOPEN=1 and STABLE_BLOCK_REOPEN_REASON is one of the allowed reasons.
